narrative:
César Montes is a formidable centre-back for Mexico, consistently anchoring their defense. His overall rating of 7.15/10 places him in the top 5% of centre-backs at this tournament. This high rating highlights his significant impact and reliability on the pitch.

Montes showcases strong defensive fundamentals, evidenced by his 8.286 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His low expected goals of 0.025 per 90 minutes and expected assists of 0.009 per 90 minutes indicate he is not an offensive threat. A substantial 69% of his overall rating comes from consistent club form over the last two seasons.

Montes serves as a crucial defensive anchor for the Mexican national team, playing 315 minutes so far. Scouts should continue to observe his dominant aerial presence and high volume of clearances. His performance will be key for Mexico's defensive stability in their remaining matches.
